rationale: Romanian government formation remains the dominant domestic story; no new qualitative development this cycle, but it stays the highest-impact item for Romanian residents.

top_events.title: Romanian president picks Liberal former mayor as PM
top_events.summary: The nomination of a Liberal PM candidate is a continuation of the government formation process — confidence vote still pending, directly affecting Romania's political stability and EU fund access.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: signing claimed by Trump, disputed by Tehran
top_events.summary: A confirmed deal could ease energy prices relevant to Romania's import-dependent economy, but conflicting signals mean no change yet.

top_events.title: UK forces seize suspected Russian shadow fleet tanker in English Channel
top_events.summary: Enforcement against Russia's shadow fleet is a mild positive for Black Sea security context and sanctions pressure on Russia, relevant to Romania's regional security.
